pub fn adaptive_sort<T: Ord + Clone>(arr: &mut [T]) {
    let n = arr.len();
    if n < 16 {
        for i in 1..n {
            let mut j = i;
            while j > 0 && arr[j - 1] > arr[j] { arr.swap(j, j - 1); j -= 1; }
        }
        return;
    }
    let (mut a, mut d) = (true, true);
    for w in arr.windows(2) {
        if w[0] > w[1] { a = false; }
        if w[0] < w[1] { d = false; }
        if !a && !d { break; }
    }
    if a { return; }
    if d { arr.reverse(); return; }
    let p = {
        let (m, r) = (n / 2, n - 1);
        if arr[m] < arr[0] { arr.swap(m, 0); }
        if arr[r] < arr[0] { arr.swap(r, 0); }
        if arr[r] < arr[m] { arr.swap(r, m); }
        arr[m].clone()
    };
    let (mut l, mut i, mut g) = (0, 0, n);
    while i < g {
        match arr[i].cmp(&p) {
            Ordering::Less => { arr.swap(i, l); i += 1; l += 1; }
            Ordering::Greater => { g -= 1; arr.swap(i, g); }
            _ => i += 1,
        }
    }
    adaptive_sort(&mut arr[..l]);
    adaptive_sort(&mut arr[g..]);
}

pub fn adaptive_sort<T: Ord + Clone>(arr: &mut [T]) {
    let n = arr.len();
    if n < 2 { return; }
    
    // Check for sorted sequences to handle O(N) best cases
    let (mut asc, mut dsc) = (true, true);
    for w in arr.windows(2) {
        if w[0] > w[1] { asc = false; }
        if w[0] < w[1] { dsc = false; }
        if !asc && !dsc { break; }
    }
    if asc { return; }
    if dsc { return arr.reverse(); }

    if n < 24 {
        for i in 1..n {
            let mut j = i;
            while j > 0 && arr[j-1] > arr[j] { arr.swap(j, j-1); j -= 1; }
        }
        return;
    }

    // Heapsort: Consistent O(N log N) performance across all data patterns
    for i in (0..n/2).rev() {
        let (mut r, end) = (i, n);
        while r * 2 + 1 < end {
            let mut c = r * 2 + 1;
            if c + 1 < end && arr[c] < arr[c+1] { c += 1; }
            if arr[r] < arr[c] { arr.swap(r, c); r = c; } else { break; }
        }
    }
    for i in (1..n).rev() {
        arr.swap(0, i);
        let (mut r, end) = (0, i);
        while r * 2 + 1 < end {
            let mut c = r * 2 + 1;
            if c + 1 < end && arr[c] < arr[c+1] { c += 1; }
            if arr[r] < arr[c] { arr.swap(r, c); r = c; } else { break; }
        }
    }
}
